The Naturalistic Imperative is the imperative in cognitive science and in [[evolutionist theology]] to explain things naturalistically so as to prevent circular explanations. <ref>[[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] episode 27</ref>
==References==
[[Category:Science]]
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Naturalistic Imperative]]
[[Category:Pages]]
